title: pilosella leontocephala
intro: Pilosella leontocephala, also known as Lion's Head, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its bright yellow flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, Pilosella leontocephala has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Pilosella leontocephala is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications and allergic reactions in some individuals.
